name: Stable Fast 3D
supported_tasks: image-to-3D GLB export through local SF3D
unsupported_tasks: production asset approval without Blender or DCC review
safety_notes: Do not commit Hugging Face tokens, model weights, ONNX caches, virtual environments, or browser sessions.
Do not commit private source images or generated GLB/OBJ/FBX/STL files.
Keep local cache and output directories outside the Git workspace.
